DP.516.0000:
Oh?
Welcome!\f
You saw the notice outside about
us hiring, right?\f
Is that a Pokédex there?
Then you must know Professor Rowan!\f
You’re just the Pokémon-searching
expert we’ve been looking for!\f
DP.516.0001:
Here you are!
Good!\f
We’ve got a deadline to meet.
Here’s your assignment.\f
DP.516.0002:
[0100,0000].
I want you to bring me one.\f
You must bring it today, or we’re not
gonna be able to run our main article.\f
Remember, it has to be today.
Before the date rolls over!
DP.516.0003:
What’s up? Did you bring us
the Pokémon we needed?\f
DP.516.0004:
Oh! Ohh! Ohhh!
That’s it! [0100,0000]!\f
Thanks!
Let me get a closer look!\f
...I see, hmhm...
Right, right... That’s it!\f
Thank you!
I can write a great article now!\f
This is for your trouble.
It’s not much, but thanks!\f
DP.516.0005:
You really came through for us!
I hope you’ll help us again tomorrow!
DP.516.0006:
Whoops! What’s all this?
Your Bag is stuffed full.\f
I’ll hold on to these until
the next time.
DP.516.0007:
Oh, there you are! Here’s your
reward for the last assignment!\f
It’s not much, but thanks!
DP.516.0008:
What’s wrong? You still haven’t
caught the [0100,0000] we need?\f
We’re counting on you to come
through for us!\f
Bring us the [0100,0000]
before the date rolls over!
DP.516.0009:
Now, now! You failed to bring me the
Pokémon I asked for...\f
Things like that can happen, but
we need you to come up big for us!
DP.516.0010:
OK! I’ll crank out a riveting story
based on this!\f
Oh, right! I’ll have another
assignment for you tomorrow!
DP.516.0011:
The Sinnoh region’s newspaper is
tiny, but it has many fans.\f
That newspaper is printed right
here!
DP.516.0012:
“Weekly Poké Ball Roundup”
is the featured top story.\f
It’s a feature article on new types
of Poké Balls.\f
DP.516.0013: Which article would you like to read?
DP.516.0014:
Dark caves and streets unlit at
night are forbidding places to go.\f
If you’re threatened by the dark,
a supply of Dusk Balls is your\r
biggest ally!\f
Use them in the dark for the best
Pokémon-catching performance!\f
Keep the dark at bay on your travels
with Dusk Balls!
DP.516.0015:
Catching Pokémon is best accomplished
by whittling the target’s HP down as\r
low as possible, then tossing a Ball.\f
But a Pokémon caught that way can’t
be used in battle right away.\f
That’s where the Heal Ball comes in
handy.\f
You can lower the target’s HP bar to
red, put it to sleep, or paralyze it.\f
The Heal Ball instantly heals whatever
ails the Pokémon it catches!\f
That’s the Pokémon-friendly Heal Ball!
Please, do give it a try!
DP.516.0016:
When attempting to catch a Pokémon,
you want to cut the target’s HP.\f
But a fleet-footed Pokémon could
bolt if you take too much time.\f
The Quick Ball is the solution to
that dilemma.\f
It’s designed to work best when
thrown right at the start of battle!\f
The Quick Ball: the perfect gift for
the impatient Trainer!
